t.t-value: (vel_lines[0].equipment_name_id.display_name if vel_lines and vel_lines[0].equipment_name_id else (doc.equipment_used_name.display_name if doc.equipment_used_name else ''))

tr.t-att-class: 'pass-badge' if line.acph_result == 'pass' else ('fail-badge' if line.acph_result == 'fail' else '')

t.t-out: 'PASS' if line.acph_result == 'pass' else ('FAIL' if line.acph_result == 'fail' else 'N/A')

tr.td: ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA : AS PER ISO 14644-3:2019 (E) AIR CHANGES SHOULD NOT BE LESS THAN 20 ACPH
ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA : AS PER ISO 14644-3:2019 (E) — LEAKAGE NMT 0.01%

t.t-out: doc.particle_equipment_id.name if doc.particle_equipment_id else 'Lasair_III Particle Counter'

tr.td: ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA AS PER ISO-14644-2:2015 (E) or EU GMP — Maximum Permitted number of particles/m³ equal to or less than the above limits

t.t-out: doc.recovery_equipment_id.name if doc.recovery_equipment_id else 'Lasair_III Particle Counter'

tr.td: ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA: NMT 15 Min AS PER ISO-14644-3:2019 (E)

Sign & Date
For, Micron HVAC Pvt.Ltd.
